title: Red River
author: Borden Chase (Film)
content: “There's only one way to run a drive: my way.”

title: The Good, the Bad and the Ugly
author: Sergio Leone (Film)
content: “In this world, there's two kinds of people, my friend: Those with loaded guns and those who dig. You dig.”

title: Blood Meridian
author: Cormac McCarthy
content: “A man's at odds to know his mind cause his mind is aught he has to know it with.”

title: Pale Rider
author: Clint Eastwood (Film)
content: “There's nothing like a good piece of hickory.”

title: The Big Trail
author: Raoul Walsh (Film)
content: “It ain't the trail that's hard; it's the staying on it.”
